allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; apps=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(a.get\('uuid'\),'|',a.get\('name'\),'|',a.get\('fqdn'\)\) for a in apps]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; [print\(e['key'],'=',e['value'][:40]\) for e in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; [print\(e['key'],'=',e['value']\) for e in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if 'AUTH' in e['key']]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; [print\(g['pk'],g['name'],len\(g.get\('users',[]\)\)\) for g in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['results']]")
